completed: Documentation baseline (five manuals + master index)
AI Operating System generation (ai/context, ai/memory, ai/rules, ai/prompts, ai/docs, ai/knowledge, ai/indexes, ai/templates, CLAUDE.md)
Documentation consistency pass v1.1 (naming standardization, missing/orphaned specs resolved)
AI-native scaffolding pass v1.2 (bootstrap.md, state.json, scripts/, checkpoints/, STATUS.md, CHANGELOG.md, TODO.md)
Cross-tool compatibility pass v1.3 (AI.md root pointer)
Architecture audit pass v1.4 (8 missing rules/*.md footers fixed, real automated validators added at scripts/)
Phases 01-04 (Foundation, Design tokens, Global Providers, Global Particle Engine) — built (see D-012), closing the earlier build-order deviation
Hero scene (Phase 05)
Hero -> Problem transition (Phase 06)
Problem scene (Phase 07)
Growth System scene (Phase 08) — first section built on the complete global-provider chain
Growth Engines scene (Phase 09) — six engines (D-014), reuses ParticleProvider/AnimationProvider directly; tablet layout bug (particle/grid breakpoint mismatch) found and fixed in review

Why PYRAXIS scene (Phase 10) — three-question belief section, Low-intensity rest beat per Visual Rhythm Map; review pass found and fixed particleType ("glow" gets no special rendering in ParticleEngine.tsx, switched to "signal") and heading hierarchy (point labels promoted span -> h3 to match Problem/GrowthEngines pattern)

Portfolio scene (Phase 11) — spec locked (ai/specs/portfolio.md) and synced to shipped code, projects.ts populated with 6 real systems, scroll-scrub rail built. Runtime QA (user screenshots) found and fixed two real bugs: (1) card hover glow/shadow clipped top+right because CSS forces overflow-y to compute 'auto' whenever overflow-x is non-visible on the same box, and wrapper padding was too small to contain the 44px shadow blur + 10px hover lift — fixed by widening wrapper padding (px-11/pt-14/pb-12, mx matched to net zero offset); (2) that padding increase silently broke the scroll-scrub distance math (wrapper.clientWidth now included the new padding, undershooting scrollLength so the last card's right edge never fully scrolled into view) — fixed by subtracting the wrapper's own computed padding before calculating visible track width. Keyboard nav, mobile snap, and cleanup/unmount logic eyeballed clean against spec.

Process scene (Phase 12) — spec written first (ai/specs/process.md, several genuine unknowns flagged as Open Questions rather than invented) and locked before any component code, per explicit user instruction mirroring Phase 11's discipline. Built: fixed five-stage vertical progression (Discovery/Strategy/Build/Launch/Scale, content.ts, never data-driven), scroll-linked traveling signal dot (no pin/horizontal rail, unlike Portfolio, since the stack is vertical at every breakpoint), ambient particles via shared ParticleProvider (shape: nodes, one target per stage, focusIndex biases toward activeStage), accelerating exit handoff on ScrollTrigger onLeave per Blueprint §15. Reduced-motion path renders a static list with no signal. tsc/eslint/next build all verified clean this session. Also found and fixed two doc-sync gaps unrelated to Process code itself: components.json was missing Portfolio/ProjectCard entries entirely (predates this session), and its top-level 'note' field falsely claimed Phase 03/04 providers weren't built yet (they were, since D-012) — both corrected.

Future-Proof Systems scene (Phase 13) — spec written first (ai/specs/future-proof-systems.md, with a mandatory Technical Constraint section and Future Upgrade Path) and locked before any component code, same discipline as Phases 11-12. Built: components/future-proof-systems/{FutureProofSystems.tsx, motion.ts, content.ts, layout.ts}. Cinematic climax rendered as three concurrent shared-engine instructions — scattered network (golden-angle-spiral targets, particleType "network"), a rotating earth-illusion ring, and a wider orbital ring (both particleType "signal" for brightness, reusing the glow->signal precedent from Why PYRAXIS) — all Canvas2D target-choreography, no Three.js/WebGL added (`three` still not in package.json). Rotation illusion is angular-offset cycling of each ring driven by a dedicated rAF loop writing directly to the external instruction store (no React state per frame). Cursor-nearest-node hover redirects nearby particles via focusIndex. Exit beat: network positions lerp toward the earth-ring center over a real duration (ease-in, hand-rolled) before the instruction phase flips to exiting, physically converging into the Earth shape CTA (Phase 14) will continue — not a crossfade. Reduced-motion path sends one static instruction per layer, no rotation/convergence/cursor polling, per ai/rules/animation.md #10. `.placeholder.md` deleted, wired into app/page.tsx after Process. tsc --noEmit, next lint, and next build all verified clean this session.

CTA scene (Phase 14, implementation) — components/cta/{CTA.tsx, content.ts, motion.ts, layout.ts} built against the locked spec (ai/specs/cta.md). Continues Future-Proof Systems earth-illusion ring directly (imports earthRingPositions/orbitPositions from components/future-proof-systems/layout.ts, reuses its rotation-speed constants) rather than reinventing it; bottom-anchored, ~30% visible, Medium density below FPS peak. Headline uses a real clip-path mask-reveal (not data-reveal y-offset) per animation.md #7, eyebrow/supporting sentence use the standard data-reveal stagger. One-time particle-convergence-into-button entry beat (playConstructBeat) eases sampled Earth-ring points toward the primary buttons measured DOM rect, fires once after copy reveal completes, then dissolves rather than persisting. Primary/secondary links reused verbatim from components/hero/HeroButtons.tsx (WhatsApp + Gmail deep links), not invented. tsc --noEmit, next lint, and next build all verified clean this session; scripts/validate-all.mjs also verified clean after fixing 4 index-drift errors it caught (components/cta/ was missing from ai/indexes/components.md as expected for new work, but the same check also caught 3 pre-existing gaps predating this session — Portfolio/ProjectCard, Process, and FutureProofSystems were never added to that index despite being built in earlier sessions — all 4 fixed together). Full Section Completion Gate (ai/rules/architecture.md #7 — real-browser breakpoint/60fps/Lighthouse/CLS pass) NOT run this session (no browser tool available); .placeholder.md deleted since the feature is genuinely implemented, but the phase is not being marked Complete in ai/memory/roadmap.md pending that gate, same posture already on record for Phase 13.

Phase 13 (Future-Proof Systems) and Phase 14 (CTA) marked Complete after user manual browser QA (desktop/tablet/mobile, smoothness, no CLS/jank) confirmed OK; no automated Lighthouse/CLS/FPS-trace numbers captured (Playwright unusable in this sandbox). ai/memory/roadmap.md and ai/memory/progress.md updated to match.

CTA polish fixes (post-QA, this session): button hover feedback strengthened (3px lift, brightening border, stronger glow — components/cta/CTA.tsx, motion.ts) and Future-Proof->CTA pacing gap closed (earlier IntersectionObserver trigger via rootMargin, components/cta/motion.ts EARLY_ENTER_ROOT_MARGIN). tsc/eslint/next build verified clean.

Phase 16 follow-on engineering audit (separate later session): produced a prioritized HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW findings report, then implemented (1) next/dynamic code-splitting for Portfolio/Process/FutureProofSystems/CTA/Footer in app/page.tsx (kept SSR on; First Load JS unchanged at ~169kB since sections render unconditionally on mount, but chunks now cache/parallelize separately — deliberately did NOT gate behind IntersectionObserver/ssr:false, rejected as unnecessary architectural complexity for marginal gain), (2) HeroLogoCanvas.tsx: replaced per-frame createRadialGradient()+full-canvas fillRect() with a gradient pre-rendered once to an offscreen sprite canvas, blitted via drawImage each frame (identical visual output, removes per-frame GC churn), (3) gsap import consistency: WhyPyraxis.tsx, ProblemHeadline.tsx, HeroText.tsx, GrowthEnginesHeadline.tsx switched from bare 'gsap' import to '@/lib/gsap', (4) conservative use-client audit across all 34 client files: only HeroLogo.tsx and GlobalProviders.tsx converted to Server Components (zero-hook pure composition wrappers); GrowthNode.tsx and the other 30 kept as-is (genuine hooks/canvas/gsap/browser-API/event-handler usage). npm run build verified clean after every individual change.

Responsive layout system refactor (cross-phase architecture pass, spec ai/specs/architecture/responsive-layout-system.md): new styles/tokens/{typography,spacing,layout}.ts fluid clamp scales wired into tailwind.config.ts; found and consolidated 9x duplicated max-w-[1240px] container and 10x duplicated section-padding clamp (incl. 2 non-fluid px-6 lg:px-[60px] variants with matching endpoints) across all sections into max-w-container/px-header, zero visual diff; Hero headline clamp deduped 4x into text-hero-headline; audited every section for fixed cards/grids/GSAP-px, rest already fluid or intentional fixed-size carousel items, untouched per no-redesign scope; validate-all.mjs also fixed 2 pre-existing doc-index gaps (Footer, FounderStory) found along the way.
current: Responsive layout system refactor: token architecture + container/padding consolidation complete across all sections, build/lint/validate-all clean. Runtime measurement pass (Lighthouse/Core Web Vitals/FPS trace) still not done in this sandbox — same standing limitation as Phase 16/17.
next: Real-browser breakpoint verification of the refactor (320-2560px per spec Definition of Done) once browser tooling is available; then resume Phase 16 runtime-measurement / Phase 17 final polish, both already gated on that same missing capability.
note: ai/memory/current.md and next.md were found stale relative to actual code during the Growth Engines session (they described Phases 01-04 as skipped, but components/growth-system/GrowthSystem.tsx already used the real ParticleProvider/AnimationProvider) and have been corrected in this pass. ai/memory/roadmap.md remains authoritative for phase ordering if this ever disagrees with it again (see ai/bootstrap.md) — it was synced this session (Portfolio/Process marked Built). The 'build' field is a counter of verified clean `npm run build` passes for the current phase, reset at phase start. Phase 14 (CTA) and Phase 15 (Footer) are both implemented and complete. Per known-issues.md: this field's own growing length is flagged for a post-ship trim into changelog.md/completed.md.
openBlockers: Particle engine ownership: Hero/Problem/Growth-Engines icon canvases remain self-contained per-component Canvas2D (icon-construction is a fixed shared animation, not ambient traffic) while ambient/traveling particles now go through the global ParticleProvider (Growth System, Growth Engines) — see ai/memory/known-issues.md.
